# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

# redis-master.conf
daemonize yes
pidfile /var/run/redis-master.pid
port 6379
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode no
timeout 0
tcp-keepalive 300
loglevel notice
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-master.log
databases 16
always-show-hundreds yes
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis/master
slave-serve-stale-data yes
slave-read-only yes
repl-diskless-sync no
repl-diskless-sync-delay 5
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
repl-timeout 60
appendonly no
appendfilename "appendonly.aof"
appendfsync everysec
no-appendfsync-on-rewrite no
auto-aof-rewrite-percentage 100
auto-aof-rewrite-min-size 64mb
aof-load-truncated yes
aof-use-rdb-preamble yes
lua-time-limit 5000
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128
latency-monitor-threshold 0
notify-keyspace-events ""
hash-max-ziplist-entries 512
hash-max-ziplist-value 64
list-max-ziplist-size -2
list-compress-depth 0
set-max-intset-entries 512
zset-max-ziplist-entries 128
zset-max-ziplist-value 64
hll-sparse-max-bytes 3000
stream-node-max-bytes 4096
stream-node-max-entries 100
activerehashing yes
client-output-buffer-limit normal 0 0 0
client-output-buffer-limit replica 256mb 64mb 60
client-output-buffer-limit pubsub 32mb 8mb 60
hz 10
dynamic-hz yes
aof-rewrite-incremental-fsync yes
rdb-save-incremental-fsync yes

# Replication specific configuration for the master
# No requirepass set on master, so slaves don't need masterauth.
min-slaves-to-write 0
min-slaves-max-lag 10

#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# redis-slave.conf
daemonize yes
pidfile /var/run/redis-slave1.pid
port 6380
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode no
timeout 0
tcp-keepalive 300
loglevel notice
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-slave1.log
databases 16
always-show-hundreds yes
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis/slave1
slave-serve-stale-data yes
slave-read-only yes
repl-diskless-sync no
repl-diskless-sync-delay 5
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
repl-timeout 60
appendonly no
appendfilename "appendonly.aof"
appendfsync everysec
no-appendfsync-on-rewrite no
auto-aof-rewrite-percentage 100
auto-aof-rewrite-min-size 64mb
aof-load-truncated yes
aof-use-rdb-preamble yes
lua-time-limit 5000
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128
latency-monitor-threshold 0
notify-keyspace-events ""
hash-max-ziplist-entries 512
hash-max-ziplist-value 64
list-max-ziplist-size -2
list-compress-depth 0
set-max-intset-entries 512
zset-max-ziplist-entries 128
zset-max-ziplist-value 64
hll-sparse-max-bytes 3000
stream-node-max-bytes 4096
stream-node-max-entries 100
activerehashing yes
client-output-buffer-limit normal 0 0 0
client-output-buffer-limit replica 256mb 64mb 60
client-output-buffer-limit pubsub 32mb 8mb 60
hz 10
dynamic-hz yes
aof-rewrite-incremental-fsync yes
rdb-save-incremental-fsync yes

# Replication specific configuration for the slave
slaveof 127.0.0.1 6379
# No masterauth needed as the master does not have a requirepass.
